# over the rainbow

## 内容摘要

主题: over the rainbow
发件人: "刘梦" <crosssunshine@163.com>
日期: 2004-07-01 14:26:49+08:00

Max,Today let&#8217;s have a view over the rainbow.Somewhere over the rainbow way up highThere&#8216;s a land that I heard of once in a lullabySomewhere over the rainbow skies are blue And the dreams that you dare to dream really do come true .Someday I wish upon a star and wake up where the clouds are far behind meWhere troubles smelled like lemon drops away above the chimney tops   That&#8217;s where you&#8217;ll find meSomewhere over the rainbow blue birds flyBlue birds fly over the rainbow Why can&#x27;t I ?This is the so-called &#8220; rainbow &#8220;So we can take a wonderful scenery over the rainbow.Ok ,let&#8217;s just take
